title: Boot gateway production firmware
description: Boot lichen/apps/gateway on native_sim, native_sim/native/64, and qemu_x86 rather than accepting the current build_only sample result. Require a late gateway marker or successful CoAP interaction; classify hardware and Renode board targets explicitly.
acceptance_criteria: 1. Gateway reaches main and a late ready/CoAP oracle on native_sim, native_sim/native/64, and qemu_x86 where supported. 2. Commands, revision, hashes, and logs are recorded. 3. All gateway board fragments receive WIN/FAIL/BLOCKED classification. 4. Failures have linked remediation Beads.
notes:
EVIDENCE SCOPE: gateway startup/L2/service registration, not host-reachable CoAP request-response. Base revision 8e02a7ae924a226c91c23d8d19f0f5350c248364 plus scoped current CoAP fixes (stdio declarations in coap_server.c/coap_status.c, subsystem iterable linker registration and sections-ram.ld, and unique lichen_server_config resource identifier). Builder i-03d978911e97d4350, ARM64 us-west-2c, Project=LICHEN; workspace /mnt/lichen-zephyr/work/project-LICHEN-m5m1; SOURCE_DATE_EPOCH=1784142068. NATIVE_SIM/NATIVE/64 WIN: west build -p always -b native_sim/native/64 -s $repo/lichen/apps/gateway -d /mnt/lichen-zephyr/validation/project-LICHEN-m5m1/gateway-native64 -- -DZEPHYR_EXTRA_MODULES=$repo/lichen. Runtime: timeout 10s gateway-native64/zephyr/zephyr.exe > gateway-native64-runtime.log 2>&1. Oracle: Booting Zephyr OS v3.7.0, lichen_l2 initialized (full framing), LICHEN gateway starting, CoAP server on port 5683 (AUTOSTART), no Failed to autostart service, and exit 124 expected after continued service runtime. Artifact SHA-256 70eef89e50e656add8d866356c19c72cff16a269626404455ecbfd1642347048. Logs: /mnt/lichen-zephyr/validation/project-LICHEN-m5m1/gateway-native64-build.log and gateway-native64-runtime.log. The native host Ethernet zeth creation error is unrelated/unused; LICHEN L2 independently initialized. QEMU_X86 WIN: west build -p always -b qemu_x86 -s $repo/lichen/apps/gateway -d /mnt/lichen-zephyr/validation/project-LICHEN-m5m1/gateway-qemu-x86 -- -DZEPHYR_EXTRA_MODULES=$repo/lichen. Runtime used generated QEMU CPU/machine/kernel and preserved two UARTs while replacing unavailable SLIP UNIX socket with -serial null: timeout 10s $qemu -m 32 -cpu qemu32,+nx,+pae -machine q35 -device isa-debug-exit,iobase=0xf4,iosize=0x04 -no-reboot -nographic -machine acpi=off -net none -chardev stdio,id=con,mux=on -serial chardev:con -mon chardev=con,mode=readline -serial null -kernel gateway-qemu-x86/zephyr/zephyr.elf > gateway-qemu-x86-runtime.log 2>&1. Oracle: Booting Zephyr OS, LICHEN gateway starting, No LoRa radio configured - CoAP/local-client only, CoAP server on port 5683 (AUTOSTART), no autostart failure, expected exit 124. Artifact SHA-256 9fe473286434072ec81c1fa06c29922b5fe2518bf0661895a76c071b432d71c2. Logs: gateway-qemu-x86-build.log and gateway-qemu-x86-runtime.log under the same validation root. Both WIN builds passed tools/zephyr-clean-worktree.sh verify module isolation; no runtime process remained. NATIVE_SIM 32-BIT BLOCKED: unsupported on reachable ARM64 builder, where Zephyr requires native_sim/native/64; x86 builder i-0b9423e5181dd9066 is inaccessible under strict ED25519 host-key validation, tracked by project-LICHEN-jaqv. HARDWARE/RENODE ROWS, all BLOCKED pending independent runtime evidence under project-LICHEN-n39k: nrf52840dk/nrf52840; nucleo_wl55jc; t1000_e/nrf52840; t_echo/nrf52840; r1_neo/nrf52840; heltec_wifi_lora32_v3/esp32s3/procpu; t_deck/esp32s3/procpu. Existing Renode models do not declare gateway-app recipes, and compile evidence is not boot proof. During validation, base snapshot failed on missing stdio declarations and duplicate lichen_config resource symbols; current scoped fixes produce both successful runtime artifacts. Local git diff --check passes.
REVIEW CORRECTIONS / FINAL SOURCE IDENTITY: Native64 artifact hash 70eef89e... above is superseded after fixing legacy CoAP service lifecycle; final native64 SHA-256 is 1de45cee1bde5440a0b512d217e4fda8fb5710908e0582089c87a2bcf59ae12b. QEMU hash remains 9fe473286434072ec81c1fa06c29922b5fe2518bf0661895a76c071b432d71c2. Exact source identity is base 8e02a7ae924a226c91c23d8d19f0f5350c248364 plus remote git diff --binary SHA-256 d22f4eb7467bbb5955175c2e504137d1a1cd3d1fad779766a76d3ed5763bd8f8 and untracked sections-ram.ld SHA-256 096bc501436c729c2a2a028dafef88145d452abc8426ab299a60dcc4e3163735. Relevant final file hashes: CMakeLists.txt c58967df0f39ba6c7e33a5c42c1d92b9f62e7b33e7199fb3507a2ccc53d2f3a7; coap_server.c 084289390d6eec54451f8af45eeba2dba05733f1b04c9e2af858625e159d5c3d; coap_status.c 52710495831685ec8faf03970be047a2d5b8a4951f5798276b2e44931ee61d03; lichen_l2.c 3c6613dfcba691f0701e5784f0a94d8ba03a3b9c4b193ed2e07540b1f77cfccb. Exact variable values: repo=/mnt/lichen-zephyr/work/project-LICHEN-m5m1; validation root=/mnt/lichen-zephyr/validation/project-LICHEN-m5m1; qemu=/mnt/lichen-zephyr/zephyr-sdk-0.16.8/sysroots/aarch64-pokysdk-linux/usr/bin/qemu-system-i386. Final local evidence copies: /var/folders/pg/t21pc_0j6_3bq40d087mjbrw0000gn/T/opencode/{zephyr.exe,zephyr.elf,gateway-native64-build.log,gateway-native64-runtime.log,gateway-qemu-x86-build.log,gateway-qemu-x86-runtime.log}. Local evidence hashes respectively: 1de45cee1bde5440a0b512d217e4fda8fb5710908e0582089c87a2bcf59ae12b; 9fe473286434072ec81c1fa06c29922b5fe2518bf0661895a76c071b432d71c2; 39ac2f9793ae774b0d05419eadba156f73785a6f55787b5036b561ba9a35a753; 7d38a184f45e7002aab33de4b0412d6cc2b3f0270f9e86a0e2ff5633690c8d24; fd4c0cbb21663882470db9e04c6cb6f6c220a0a8d3cc2559882e33f4344d2369; de6452d6ba9fd9c1a76ef5cf4df446811ebad30afd3273b0fcfeaa4a39de313c. Lifecycle fix: legacy lichen_coap_server no longer autostarts before handler initialization; lichen_coap_server_init() starts it explicitly, preventing gateway duplicate UDP/5683 binding while preserving documented API behavior. Both zephyr_linker_sources and zephyr_iterable_section are required, matching the gateway app pattern; removing the linker fragment reproducibly breaks native simulator final linking. Native32 blocker is project-LICHEN-o4yi, replacing the earlier jaqv reference.
LOCAL EVIDENCE PATH CORRECTION: the generic opencode/zephyr.exe filename was later reused by puck evidence. The gateway native64 artifact is retained uniquely as /var/folders/pg/t21pc_0j6_3bq40d087mjbrw0000gn/T/opencode/gateway-native64.exe, verified SHA-256 1de45cee1bde5440a0b512d217e4fda8fb5710908e0582089c87a2bcf59ae12b. Other gateway evidence paths/hashes are unchanged.
close_reason: Proved corrected gateway startup on native_sim/native/64 and qemu_x86 with full source/artifact/log fingerprints, retained local evidence, L2/main/CoAP markers, controlled timeouts, module-isolation checks, and no leaked processes. Classified native_sim 32-bit BLOCKED under project-LICHEN-o4yi and all seven hardware/Renode boards BLOCKED under project-LICHEN-n39k. Fixed CoAP declarations, resource collision, linker registration, and duplicate-service lifecycle; three independent reviews converged with no findings.
